free_text: The (Li-6,d) and (Li-7,t) reactions on O-16.
English translation
dE-E telescope was used. Ionization chamber
with a grid was used as dE-detector; silicon
counter with a sensitive area of 3.5 mm was used as
E-detector.
Tungsten oxide (1.0 mg/cm2 thickness) deposited onto
0.25 mg/cm2 thick gold backing was used.
*By authors* In a doublet 5.62-5.80 MeV most
contribution is of 5.80 MeV level; in a doublet
7.17-7.20 MeV the 5.80 MeV level is excited
predominantly.
No source of uncertainties for the error
bars is given
Fig. 2a, 3a, 4b
No source of uncertainties for the error
bars is given
